testcase.name: test_html_routes_render_expected_templates[/manage/analytics-manage_analytics.html]

type: ignore[no-any-return] app.py:327: in manage_analytics return render_template("manage_analytics.html") /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/flask/templating.py:151: in render_template return _render(app, template, context) /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/flask/templating.py:132: in _render rv = template.render(context) /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/jinja2/environment.py:1295: in render self.environment.handle_exception() /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/jinja2/environment.py:942: in handle_exception raise rewrite_traceback_stack(source=source) templates/manage_analytics.html:1: in top-level template code {% extends "base_manage.html" %} /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/flask/templating.py:66: in get_source return self._get_source_fast(environment, template) /home/heldofthewelt/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/flask/templating.py:100: in _get_source_fast raise TemplateNotFound(template) E jinja2.exceptions.TemplateNotFound: base_manage.html
